sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER E WHERE E.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.LADDERID in ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# ) ORDER BY E.LADDERID DESC

SELECT E.LADDERID, E.TYPE, E.TITLE, E.WRITERID, E.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(E.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, E.STATUS, E.SECRETFLAG, E.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER E WHERE E.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND E.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND E.LADDERID in ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# ) ORDER BY E.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC

SELECT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER A JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE D ON A.LADDERID = D.LADDERID WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId# ) AND D.USERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%') ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#)
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND A.TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND A.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER A JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE D ON A.LADDERID = D.LADDERID WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId# ) AND D.USERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%') ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT A.LADDERID, A.TYPE, A.TITLE, A.WRITERID, A.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(A.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, A.STATUS, A.SECRETFLAG, A.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#)
AND A.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND A.TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND A.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
ORDER BY A.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER D JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE E ON D.LADDERID = E.LADDERID WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR A.WRITERID = #userId# ) AND E.USERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%') ORDER BY D.LADDERID DESC
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_LADDER D WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# )
AND D.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND D.TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND D.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
ORDER BY D.LADDERID DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT DISTINCT D.LADDERID, D.TYPE, D.TITLE, D.WRITERID, D.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(D.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, D.STATUS, D.SECRETFLAG, D.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER D JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE E ON D.LADDERID = E.LADDERID WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR A.WRITERID = #userId# ) AND E.USERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%') ORDER BY D.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#
select.isNotEqual:
SELECT D.LADDERID, D.TYPE, D.TITLE, D.WRITERID, D.WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(D.WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, D.STATUS, D.SECRETFLAG, D.DELETEFLAG FROM TBL_LADDER D WHERE D.DELETEFLAG = 0 AND D.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND D.LADDERID IN ( SELECT A.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER A WHERE
A.SECRETFLAG = 0 or A.LADDERID = ANY( SELECT B.LADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER B JOIN TBL_LADDER_LINE C ON B.LADDERID = C.LADDERID WHERE C.USERID = #userId#) OR
A.WRITERID = #userId# )
AND D.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND D.TYPE LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
AND D.WRITERNAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchInput#, '%')
ORDER BY D.LADDERID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER SET DELETEFLAG = 1, DELETEDATE = #deleteDate# WHERE WRITERID = #userId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LADDERID, TYPE, TITLE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME$lang$, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(WRITEDATE, INTERVAL #offset# MINUTE),'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') WRITEDATE, STATUS, SECRETFLAG, DELETEFLAG, DEPTNAME$lang$, LINECNT, LINEARRAY FROM TBL_LADDER WHERE LADDERID = #ladderId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER (TENANT_ID, TITLE, TYPE, SECRETFLAG, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, WRITERNAME2, DEPTNAME, DEPTNAME2, LINECNT, WRITEDATE) VALUES (#tenant_id#, #title#, #type#, #secretFlag#, #writerId#, #writerName#, #writerName2#, #deptName#, #deptName2#, #lineCnt#, #writeDate#)

INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_LINE (TENANT_ID, LADDERID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, ITEM, LADDERORDER) VALUES (#tenant_id#, #ladderId#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #item#, #ladderOrder#)
SELECT MAX(LADDERID) FROM TBL_LADDER WHERE WRITERID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#
sqlMap.select: SELECT MAX(LADDERID) FROM TBL_LADDER WHERE WRITERID = #writerId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id#

SELECT IFNULL(O.LADDERID, L.LADDERID) ORIG_ID, O.CHANGELADDERID, L.LADDERID, L.TYPE, L.TITLE, L.WRITERID FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER O RIGHT JOIN TBL_LADDER L ON L.LADDERID = O.CHANGELADDERID WHERE L.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND L.WRITERID = #userId# ORDER BY ORIG_ID DESC LIMIT #startPoint#, #endPoint#
SELECT LADDERID, CHANGELADDERID FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_ORDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_ORDER(TENANT_ID, LADDERID, CHANGELADDERID, USERID) VALUES (#tenant_id#, #ladderId#, #changeLadderId#, #userId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT ID, LADDERID, COMMENT, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# ORDER BY WRITEDATE DESC
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_LADDER_COMMENT (TENANT_ID, LADDERID, COMMENT, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE) VALUES (#tenant_id#, #ladderId#, #comment#, #userId#, #userName#, #userName2#, #writeDate#)
sqlMap.select:
SELECT ID, LADDERID, COMMENT, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2, WRITEDATE FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND
ID = (SELECT MAX(ID) FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId#)
ID = #id#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER_COMMENT SET COMMENT = #comment#, WRITEDATE = #writeDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID = #id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_COMMENT WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND ID = #id# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT LADDERBMID, BMNAME, USERID, REGDATE FROM TBL_LADDER_BM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #userId# ORDER BY LADDERBMID
SELECT ID, LADDERBMID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2 FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# ORDER BY ID
sqlMap.insert: INSERT TBL_LADDER_BM (TENANT_ID, BMNAME, USERID, REGDATE) VALUES (#tenant_id#, #bmName#, #userId#, #regdate#)

INSERT TBL_LADDER_BMUSER (TENANT_ID, LADDERBMID, USERID, USERNAME, USERNAME2) VALUES (#tenant_id#,
(SELECT MAX(LADDERBMID) FROM TBL_LADDER_BM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND USERID = #writerId#),
#ladderBmId#,
#userId#, #userName#, #userName2#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER_BM SET BMNAME = #bmName#, REGDATE = #regdate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# AND USERID = #userId#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_BM WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# AND USERID = #userId#
DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId# AND USERID = #userId# AND USERNAME$lang$ = #userName#
DELETE FROM TBL_LADDER_BMUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERBMID = #ladderBmId#
sqlMap.select: SELECT * FROM TBL_LADDER_LINE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId# ORDER BY LADDERORDER
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_LADDER SET LINEARRAY = #lineArray#, status = 1, STARTDATE = #startDate# WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND LADDERID = #ladderId#

UPDATE TBL_LADDER_LINE SET RESULTUSERID = #resultUserId#, RESULTUSERNAME = #resultUserName#, RESULTUSERNAME2 = #resultUserName2# WHERE LADDERORDER = #ladderOrder# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #ladderId#
UPDATE TBL_LADDER_LINE SET LADDERORDER = #secondUserOrder#, ITEM = #secondItem# WHERE USERID = #firstUser# AND TENANT_ID = #tenant_id# AND LADDERID = #LadderId#
